channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Mike Ashley Admits to Using Covert Surveillance Against JD Sports Rival
item.description: In a rare and candid interview, Mike Ashley, founder of Sports Direct, has confirmed that he orchestrated covert surveillance that ultimately contributed to the downfall of his long-time business riva...

item.title: Bulgaria achieves first Eurovision victory as Dara triumphs with Bangaranga
item.description: Bulgaria has secured its first-ever Eurovision victory at the 70th edition of the contest, held in Vienna, with singer Dara performing the song Bangaranga. The 27-year-old described the track as “pop ...

item.title: ArXiv Implements One-Year Ban for Authors Who Misuse AI in Research Papers
item.description: ArXiv, a prominent preprint repository widely used in computer science and mathematics, is strengthening its policies against the misuse of large language models (LLMs) in scientific papers. While arX...

item.title: Peter Obi Condoles Families of Security Personnel Killed in Yobe Attack
item.description: For Yobe State, another wahala don happen as terrorist attack hit military training school for Buni Yadi, wey don lead to death of at least 17 police officers plus some soldiers. Families of the falle...

item.title: Remembering Susannah York: Icon of British Cinema in the 1960s and 1970s
item.description: Susannah York, known for her striking blue eyes and ethereal blonde beauty, was much more than a classic 'English Rose.' Emerging in the 1960s, she became a defining figure of the British New Wave, de...

item.title: Delhi Court Grants Pre-Arrest Bail to Robert Vadra in Haryana Land Transaction Case
item.description: A Delhi court on Saturday granted pre-arrest bail to businessman Robert Vadra in a money laundering case linked to a land deal in Haryana. The court observed that there was no need for Vadra's judicia...

item.title: Delta Goodrem achieves fourth place for Australia at Eurovision 2026 as Bulgaria wins
item.description: Australian singer Delta Goodrem delivered a powerful and emotionally charged performance of her ballad 'Eclipse' at the Eurovision Song Contest 2026 grand final in Vienna, earning widespread acclaim f...

item.title: Father-of-two fatally trapped in escalator while commuters fail to intervene
item.description: A tragic incident occurred at Davis Station in Somerville, Boston, where 40-year-old father Steven McCluskey lost his life after becoming trapped in an escalator. The accident took place just before 5...

item.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay retains key portfolios including Home and Women Welfare in first TVK Cabinet
item.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister C Joseph Vijay has assumed direct control over several crucial departments in the newly formed Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) government. Following the assembly elections, Vi...

item.title: Trump reacts to Sen. Bill Cassidy's loss in Louisiana GOP primary
item.description: Former President Donald Trump publicly celebrated the defeat of Senator Bill Cassidy in a three-way Republican primary in Louisiana. Cassidy, who was one of only seven Senate Republicans to vote to co...

item.title: Kakamega High Court Upholds David Ndakwa’s Win in Malava By-Election
item.description: The High Court in Kakamega has dismissed the petition filed by John Karakacha challenging the results of the Malava by-election, confirming David Ndakwa as the duly elected MP. Seth Panyako, who backe...

item.title: Senate Faces Legal and Political Risks After Bato dela Rosa Evades ICC Warrant
item.description: The recent escape of Senator Ronald “Bato” dela Rosa from the Philippine Senate has raised serious legal and political concerns. After months in hiding, he attended a Senate session coinciding with a ...

item.title: Defence Minister Angie Motshekga attributes SANDF Chief General Maphanywa's contract extension to President Ramaphosa
item.description: Defence Minister Angie Motshekga has responded to criticism regarding the extension of Chief of the South African National Defence Force (SANDF), General Rudzani Maphanywa's contract. Maphanywa, who i...

item.title: Exploring the Elegance and Legacy of the 1952 Delahaye 235 Coupe
item.description: The 1952 Delahaye 235 Coupe represents one of the last great achievements of France's renowned automotive industry. Emerging at a time when traditional French coachbuilding was waning, the 235 Coupe e...

item.title: Health risks from unsafe water in Kenya
item.description: Kenya is quietly facing a serious health challenge due to contaminated water sources across the country. Many of the water systems, especially in rural and peri-urban areas, are not properly monitored...

item.title: Family of late journalist Kimani Mbugua appeals for help as father remains in custody over alleged extortion case
item.description: The family of the late Kenyan journalist Kimani Mbugua is facing fresh distress months after his death, following reports that his father, Dedan Kimani, has been in prison since February 2026 over an ...

item.title: Andy Burnham Leads Labour Members’ Preference in Potential Leadership Change
item.description: A recent snap poll conducted by Mail on Sunday indicates that Andy Burnham, the Mayor of Manchester, has emerged as the leading choice among Labour party members to succeed Sir Keir Starmer as Prime M...

item.title: POPCRU rejects plans to reintroduce rank insignia in Correctional Services
item.description: The Police and Prisons Civil Rights Union (POPCRU) has firmly opposed the Department of Correctional Services’ plans to reintroduce rank insignia for senior management. The announcement came after Min...

item.title: Labor retains Stafford seat in closely contested by-election
item.description: Labor has narrowly held onto the Stafford seat in a pivotal Queensland state by-election, despite facing a significant swing towards the LNP. Labor candidate Luke Richmond leads with 51.2 per cent of ...

item.title: Sofia Vergara attends Las Vegas party following divorce
item.description: Sofia Vergara, the 53-year-old actress formerly of 'Modern Family', was spotted at the opening of Omnia Day Club in Caesars Palace, Las Vegas, socialising with a number of young male attendees. The ev...
